summary: The conversation is between two speakers, where Speaker 1 inquires about a car booking, specifically the C10RR model, and discusses logistic charges and delivery details. Speaker 0 provides assistance and offers to forward the details to the team. The conversation also touches on a discount offer and a potential meeting at the showroom.

key_discussion_points.details: Speaker 1 inquired about the C10RR car model and its price. Speaker 0 offered to forward the details to the team.
Speaker 1 asked about reducing existing logistic charges, and Speaker 0 offered to discuss the issue with the team.
Speaker 1 requested home delivery, but was initially told to go to the showroom. Speaker 0 later confirmed that home delivery was possible.
Speaker 1 mentioned a discount of 18,000 on Diwali, but Speaker 0 was unsure about the details and suggested meeting at the showroom to discuss.

decisions_made: Speaker 1 will take delivery of the car on Thursday
Speaker 1 will go to Cuttack to collect the car

action_items.task: Forward car booking details to the team
Discuss logistic charges with the team
Meet at the showroom to discuss discount and delivery details
